description: Clever Route Ops pinned image deploy

runCommand: if [ "$actual_sha" != "$SSM_DeployControlBundleSha" ]; then echo "Route Ops source sync bundle SHA mismatch." >&2; exit 65; fi

cat > "$tmp_dir/expected-manifest" <<'MANIFEST'
infra/caddy/Caddyfile
infra/compose/docker-compose.prod.yml
scripts/deploy-route-ops-image.sh
scripts/rollback-route-ops-image.sh
scripts/smoke-route-ops-production.mjs
scripts/ssm-route-ops-deploy.sh
MANIFEST
if ! diff -u "$tmp_dir/expected-manifest" "$tmp_dir/actual-manifest"; then echo "Route Ops source sync bundle manifest mismatch." >&2; exit 65; fi

for file in infra/caddy/Caddyfile infra/compose/docker-compose.prod.yml scripts/deploy-route-ops-image.sh scripts/rollback-route-ops-image.sh scripts/smoke-route-ops-production.mjs scripts/ssm-route-ops-deploy.sh; do case "$file" in *.env|*.env.*|*secret*|*token*|*cookie*|*storageState*) echo "Refusing to sync secret-like deploy control path: $file" >&2; exit 65 ;; esac; if [ -f "$file" ]; then mkdir -p "$backup_dir/$(dirname "$file")"; cp "$file" "$backup_dir/$file"; fi; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$file")"; cp "$tmp_dir/$file" "$file"; done
echo "Route Ops deploy control source sync complete: imageTag=$SSM_ImageTag bundleSha=$SSM_DeployControlBundleSha backup=$backup_dir"

sha256sum infra/caddy/Caddyfile infra/compose/docker-compose.prod.yml scripts/deploy-route-ops-image.sh scripts/rollback-route-ops-image.sh scripts/smoke-route-ops-production.mjs scripts/ssm-route-ops-deploy.sh
